person.name: Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Sir Robert Fraunceys of Foremark, Derbyshire. 

Sir Robert Franceys, Sheriff of Nottinghamshire & Derbyshire was born circa 1360 at of Foremark, Derbyshire, England.

He married Isabel Brumpton, daughter of Sir Thomas Brumpton, circa 1381.

Sir Robert Franceys, Sheriff of Nottinghamshire & Derbyshire died between 1419 and 1420.

Francis inherited the manor of Foremark from his father, who represented Derbyshire in several Parliaments and served on a number of local commissions. 

Kinsman of John Fraunceys, Papal legate and canon of Wells. 

«b»Children«/b»
1.) Isabel Fraunceys, mar. to Sir Gervais Clifton

2.) Sir Robert Francis, Sheriff of Derbyshire

3.) Thomas Fraunceys

4.) Joan Frauncis, mar. to Thomas Harcourt of Bosworth

5.) Joyce Fraunceys, mar. to Thomas Gifford of Shillington

6.) Anne Fraunceys, mar. to Robert Stanton

7.) Alice Fraunceys, mar. to Richard Peyton of Chesterton

8.) Mary Fraunceys, mar to Nicholas Strelley

9.) Isabel, mar. to Robert Coney of Weston Coney

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire於大約1360年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾福爾馬可時，他的父親Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV20歲，母親Cecily De Beaufoy17歲。他於大約1380年與Isabel Bernehaud在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1420年在英國英格蘭享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire was born about 1360, in Foremark, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV, was 20 and his mother, Cecily De Beaufoy, was 17. He married Isabel Bernehaud about 1380, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died about 1420, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire est né environ 1360, à Foremark, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Cecily De Beaufoy, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Bernehaud environ 1380, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé environ 1420, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire um 1360 in Foremark, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV 20 und seine Mutter Cecily De Beaufoy 17. Er hat um 1380 in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Isabel Bernehaud geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 1420 im Alter von 62 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire è nato il circa 1360 nel Foremark, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Cecily De Beaufoy, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Bernehaud circa 1380, nel Derby, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1420, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshireが約1360年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアフォーエマークで生まれた時，父Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IVは20歳，母Cecily De Beaufoyは17歳であった。約1380年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーでIsabel Bernehaudと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は約1420年にイギリスイギリスで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire(이)가 대략 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 포렘아르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily De Beaufoy(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 Isabel Bernehaud(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1420년 영국 잉글랜드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire nasceu aproximadamente 1360, em Foremark, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Cecily De Beaufoy, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Bernehaud aproximadamente 1380, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1420, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire родился около 1360 г. в местности форемарк, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily De Beaufoy, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Bernehaud около 1380 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер около 1420 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire nació aproximadamente 1360, en Foremark, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Cecily De Beaufoy, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Isabel Bernehaud aproximadamente 1380, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1420, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
